Container.Name: energy-dashboard
Container.Overview: Home energy monitoring dashboard — aggregates Xcel smart meter, Emporia Vue circuit data, and APSystems/Everlight solar production into a single dashboard.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port to access the dashboard in your browser

Config.Name: Emporia Token Cache
Config.Description: Emporia Vue auth token cache — create an empty file here before first run

Config.Name: Utility Rate ($/kWh)
Config.Description: Your Xcel electricity rate in dollars per kWh — check your bill

Config.Name: [Xcel] Meter IP Address
Config.Description: Local IP of your Xcel Itron Gen 5 Riva meter (find in router DHCP as 'xcel-meter'). Leave blank to use placeholder data.

Config.Name: [Xcel] Meter Port
Config.Description: Meter local API port — almost certainly 8081

Config.Name: [Xcel] Cert Path (in container)
Config.Description: Path to TLS cert inside container — leave default unless you moved files

Config.Name: [Xcel] Key Path (in container)
Config.Description: Path to TLS key inside container — leave default unless you moved files

Config.Name: [Emporia] Email
Config.Description: Email address for your Emporia app account. Leave blank to use placeholder data.

Config.Name: [Emporia] Password
Config.Description: Password for your Emporia app account

Config.Name: [Emporia] Token Cache Path (in container)
Config.Description: Where Emporia auth tokens are cached — leave default

Config.Name: [Solar] APSystems ECU ID
Config.Description: Your ECU ID from the APSystems EMA app (13-digit number shown at top of your system page). Leave blank to use placeholder data.
